# Protocol Buffers (protobuf) v21.12

This directory contains Google Protocol Buffers v21.12 source code for cross-platform compilation.

## Structure
- `protobuf/src/` - Protobuf C++ source files
- `Protobuf.Build.cs` - Unreal Build Tool configuration

## Usage
Protobuf is compiled from source as part of the plugin build. No pre-build step required.

## Version
- Protobuf: v21.12 (3.21.12)
- Repository: https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf
- Commit: [insert commit hash]
